nasb.text: Yet in spite of all this her treacherous sister Judah did not return to Me with all her heart, but rather in deception,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Yet for all this her treacherous sister Judah did not return to me with her whole heart, but in pretense, declares the Lord.”

cnv.text: 雖然這樣，她詭詐的妹妹猶大還沒有全心歸向我，只是假意地歸我。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 尽管如此，她不忠的妹妹犹大只是假装归向我，并不诚心。这是耶和华说的。”
